title: HTTP Middleware Chain
description: Implement a composable HTTP middleware system using Go's http.Handler interface. Create middleware for logging, authentication, and rate limiting.
requirements: Define Middleware type as func(http.Handler) http.Handler
Implement LoggingMiddleware that logs request method and path
Implement AuthMiddleware that checks for Authorization header
Implement RateLimitMiddleware with token bucket algorithm
Create Chain function to compose multiple middlewares
Use standard library http package only
Handle errors by returning appropriate HTTP status codes
Context should be used for passing request-scoped values
